goal: Implement or design explicit duplicate occurrence selection without auto-resolution.
whatWasImplemented: Added a read-only duplicate occurrence model carrying file path, line number, raw line, raw value, and source depth.
Added a disabled manual occurrence selector scaffold with production_write_enabled=false.
Wired a disabled duplicate occurrence selector surface into the setting detail pane.
The detail pane shows file path, line number, raw line, current value, and source depth for each occurrence.
Added disabled future action controls labeled Choose this occurrence (planned).
Added a duplicate occurrence review workflow model with no-selection, invalid-selection, and selected-but-production-disabled states.
The review workflow records selected occurrence path, line, raw line, current value, proposed value, and source depth without enabling Apply.
Added safe-env duplicate occurrence replacement proof for exact selected line replacement.
Added backup byte-equality, reread verification, and restore-on-failure proof for fixture duplicate replacement.
Kept duplicate-conflict settings blocked in the active safe-batch path.
Added deterministic tests that assert duplicate blocked copy remains active.
Added duplicate occurrence confirmation state with missing, pending, confirmed, rejected, and expired states.
Added confirmation token matching and an occurrence fingerprint derived from selected path, line number, raw line, and raw value.
Safe-env replacement is allowed only after explicit token confirmation; production Apply remains disabled.
Added deterministic tests for missing selection, wrong token, confirmed token, expired confirmation, and production-disabled status.
Added duplicate production approval gate scaffold with missing, pending, confirmed-but-production-disabled, rejected, expired, and fingerprint-mismatch states.
Added explicit occurrence precondition record with path, line number, raw line, old value, source depth, and fingerprint.
Added confirmation-gated safe-env duplicate replacement wrapper; fixture replacement cannot run unless the confirmed occurrence fingerprint still matches.

Added tests for missing approval, pending approval, confirmed-but-production-disabled, fingerprint mismatch, unconfirmed replacement blocking, stale occurrence blocking, and confirmed safe-env replacement success.
Added disabled duplicate pre-Apply approval review UI around the production approval gate.
The UI shows approval state, selected occurrence path, line number, raw line, old value, source depth, precondition fingerprint, and block reason.
The UI includes a disabled Confirm duplicate target (planned) action and continues to show duplicate Apply as blocked.
Added source-level UI tests proving the review surface exists and remains disabled.
whatWasNotImplemented: No automatic duplicate choice was added.
No production duplicate write path was enabled.
No real config duplicate cleanup was attempted.
blockers: Needs explicit user approval and default-disabled production feature flag before duplicate replacement can be wired to production Apply.
Needs final production gate proving stale line, line mismatch, old-value mismatch, source-layer duplicate, and same-file duplicate preconditions in the real safe-batch path.
Needs production safe-batch integration review that still refuses real config unless explicitly approved.
nextRecommendedWork: Add default-disabled duplicate production activation checklist/flag model while keeping production duplicate writes off.
